properties.media:imagetext:
WIRLDCLUB FLIGHT LOG
Every time you sell a Client on
Pan Am you earn points toward
free travel for yourself.
As a member of Pan Am WorldClub,
you
earn points for every Pan Am sector you sell
(points are earned on the date of ticket issue).
Earn enough points in any given quarter, and
you can redeem them for travel on Pan Am
Refer to your Pan Am WorldClub Quarterly
for the awards you can earn.
Every time you make a sale on Pan Am, re-
cord it in your Flight Log. Sector by sector.
Note that a given trip on Pan Am may have
several sectors. Log each one separately, to
earn all the points you are entitled to. For
every sector sold, log in the ticket number,
passenger's name, the sector and the date of
travel.
Then circle one Base Point (every sector
earns at least one point). Next circle 2 Pre-
mium Points if you sold the sector First Class,
or 1 Premium Point if you sold it Clipper®
Class.
If the sector qualifies for 1 Quarterly Bonus
Point or for 2 Quarterly Bonus Points, circle
the correct number. Refer to your Pan Am
WorldClub Quarterly for those sectors that
qualify for Bonus Points in this quarter.
Finally, total the points you've earned for
that sector.
To show you how fast the points can add
up, we've used the first three lines of your
Flight Log to run through a typical example.
When you've logged enough points for the
free trip you want, just fill out your Pan Am
Flight Log. Mail it in the addressed envelope
we've provided you.
That's all there is to it.
Happy selling. And happy landing, wher-
ever you choose to fly on Pan Am.
